description:
Authors: Fu, D. and Guo, R. and Sharan, V. and Jia, R.
Title: A Implies B: Circuit Analysis in LLMs for Propositional Logical Reasoning
Year: 2024
URL: URL: https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.04105
reason: The paper 'A Implies B: Circuit Analysis in LLMs for Propositional Logical Reasoning' (arXiv:2411.04105) is real and published in 2024, but the authors listed in the query (Fu, D.; Guo, R.; Sharan, V.; Jia, R.) are incorrect. The actual authors are Guanzhe Hong, Nishanth Dikkala, Enming Luo, Cyrus Rashtchian, Xin Wang, and Rina Panigrahy. The mismatch in authorship renders the bibliography entry fabricated.
prompt_variant: You are a critical academic research verifier. Your task: determine if a bibliog...
_search_results: **Yes, the paper exists.** Its exact title is **"A Implies B: Circuit Analysis in LLMs for Propositional Logical Reasoning"**, authored by Guanzhe Hong (GZ Hong), N Dikkala, Enming Luo (E Luo), Cyrus Rashtchian (C Rashtchian), Xin Wang (X Wang), and Rina Panigrahy (R Panigrahy)[1][3][4][5][6]. It was initially submitted to arXiv on November 6, 2024 (arXiv:2411.04105v1 [cs.LG]), with the latest version v4 on June 19, 2025, and accepted as a Spotlight at **NeurIPS 2025** (Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems)[4][5]. The arXiv DOI is **10.48550/arXiv.2411.04105**[5]. Note that the queried authors "Fu D, Guo R, Sharan V, Jia R" do not match the actual author list[1][4][5].
